chapter 16
 
But the ArrayList class does NOT have a sort() method!
When you look in ArrayList, there doesn’t seem to be any method related to sorting. 
Walking up the inheritance hierarchy didn’t help either—it’5 clear that you can’t call a sort 
method on the ArrayList. 
ArrayList API
ArrayList has a lot of methods, 
but there’5 nothing here that 
looks like it would sort...

full_text:
532 
chapter 16
 
But the ArrayList class does NOT have a sort() method!
When you look in ArrayList, there doesn’t seem to be any method related to sorting. 
Walking up the inheritance hierarchy didn’t help either—it’5 clear that you can’t call a sort 
method on the ArrayList. 
ArrayList API
ArrayList has a lot of methods, 
but there’5 nothing here that 
looks like it would sort...
